Loading @composition/tests/assets/TrickyNestedVariants_root/usda/root.usd@

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Layer Stack:
     root.usd

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </A>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /A
    root.usd             /A{v1=x}
    ref.usd              /RAx

Variant Selections:
    {v1 = x}

Child names:
     ['B']

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </A/B>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /A/B
    root.usd             /A{v1=x}B
    root.usd             /A{v1=x}B{v2=y}
    ref.usd              /RBxy
    ref.usd              /RAx/B
    ref.usd              /RB

Variant Selections:
    {v2 = y}

Child names:
     ['C']

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </A/B/C>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /A/B/C
    root.usd             /A{v1=x}B/C
    root.usd             /A{v1=x}B{v2=y}C
    root.usd             /A{v1=x}B{v2=y}C{v3=z}
    ref.usd              /RCxyz
    ref.usd              /RBxy/C
    ref.usd              /RCx
    ref.usd              /RAx/B/C
    ref.usd              /RC
    ref.usd              /RB/C

Variant Selections:
    {v3 = z}
